en: Always keep watch over your child's safety.
is a parent's responsibility at every moment.

zh: 尤其父母親是家庭守護神的化身、
en: Parents are the very embodiment of the family's guardian spirit,

zh: 有義務為孩童安頓一個舒適乾淨的居家環境、
en: with a duty to provide a comfortable, clean home environment,

zh: 時時注意並設法排除可能導致危險的任何因素。
en: always alert to and removing any possible source of danger.
